recommendation: spike_c_hybrid wins: top-1 75%, top-3 31%, $0.0066/run. LLM value-add over pure structured lookup: top-1 +15%, top-3 recall +0%. The LLM improves the top result but not top-3 recall — best used to re-rank/refine structured candidates, not replace them.
metric_note: top1/top3 use token-set label overlap; low absolute top-3 recall is driven by granular/positional ground-truth labels (overcurrent, x_axis, plc_alarm, cooling_fan) absent from the alarm DB related_components. Top-1 accuracy is the more reliable signal on this label set.
